snippet.title: Bangles (OfficialВ #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аӨЎаҘҖ
snippet.description:
|| рҹ•ү || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

snippet.title: UP WALI BIHAR WALI OFFICIAL TRAILER  I аӨҜаҘӮ. аӨӘаҘҖ. аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨ№аӨҫаӨ° аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ  I RANI CHATTERJEE I SANJANA PANDEY
snippet.description:
#ranichatterjee #sanjanapandey #prashantsingh #aloksingh #reenarani #upwalibiharwali #trending #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuritrailer 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“ аӨҜаҘӮ . аӨӘаҘҖ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨ№аӨҫаӨ° аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ  (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ  аӨҡаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаҘҖ  аӨёаӨӮаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨӘаӨҫаӨӮаӨЎаҘҮаӨҜ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ…аӨІаҘӢаӨ•  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ°аҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ  , аӨІаӨІаӨҝаӨӨ  аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ , аӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ®  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаҘҒаӨІ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ•   - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ -  аӨҮаӨ®аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¶аӨ—аҘҒаӨЁ
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨёаӨ®аҘҖаӨ° аӨ¶аҘҲаҘҷ аӨө аӨңаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҰ аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° вҖ“ аӨҸаӨ® .аӨ•аҘҮ .аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ (аӨңаҘүаӨҜ )
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - аӨҰаӨҫаӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ (аӨёаӨӮаӨңаӨҜ аӨҰаӨҫаӨё )
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ•аӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨІаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ°аҘүаӨҜ   
аӨІаҘӢаӨ•аӨІ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  вҖ“  аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  ,аӨ•аӨ®аӨІаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨҰаҘҒаӨ·аҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ   аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№   
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ® аӨҰаҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ

аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаҘҒаӨІ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°
 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY MUSIC 
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ
B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 
аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө

B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ

аӨ‘аӨ«аӨҝаӨё аӨ¬аҘүаӨҜ вҖ“ аӨ•аӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҲаӨҜаӨҫ аӨқаӨҫ 

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  -
 аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ , аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨҰаҘҮаӨө аӨҹаӨҫаӨӘаӨ°аҘҮ , аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ 

B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё-
 аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ·  аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ—  , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ°  аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨ°аӨҝаӨӨаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ№аӨ°аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨІ  аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ№ , аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨөаҘҮаӨҰаҘҖ  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ«аҘҒаӨІ  аӨ—аҘҲаӨ•аӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎ

FILM- UP WALI BIHAR WALI (Bhojpuri film)

#VaariJaavan 

Lyrics:
Pachchi pindaan da sardar mera yaar ni
Jitt ke main ohnu ajj dill gayi aan haar ni
Ishq-e-majaazi da taaj sir te paa liya
Sohna-sunakkha enna jaan devan vaar ni
Pachchi pindaan da sardar mera yaar ni
Jitt ke main ohnu ajj dill gayi aan haar ni
Ishq-e-majaazi da taaj sir te paa liya
Jad vi bulaave sohna daudi main aavan

Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna ae yaar
Ni main vaari jaavan ve main dill gayi aan haar
Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna hathyaar
O ni main vaari jaavan ni main vaari vaari

HeвҖҷs so sweet canвҖҷt feel my face
When i met him it feels like sin
Your majesty come be my grace
And mercy on my inner self

Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna ae yaar
Ni main vaari jaavan ve main dill gayi aan haar
Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna hathyaar
O ni main vaari jaavan ni main vaari vaari

Vaili de kisse dekho hoye mashhoor ve
Vairi vi vekh hoye majboor ve
Bandekhane de raundan de gehne main paavan
Jo bulaave sohna te main daudi aavan

Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna ae yaar
Ni main vaari jaavan ve main dill gayi aan haar
Ni main vaari jaavan mera sohna hathyaar
O ni main vaari jaavan ni main vaari vaari

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces EarthвҖҷs mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as DoomвҖҷs influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of MarvelвҖҷs most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

в—Ғ On our channel, we create trailer mashups в–· Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesnвҖҷt exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. В§ 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the filmвҖҷs genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

fr-FR.title: Avengers : Doomsday - PremiГЁre bande-annonce В« Le dernier dieu du tonnerre В» | Chris Hemsworth | ...
fr-FR.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

DГ©couvrez le concept de bande-annonce (FAN) pour Avengers : Doomsday (2026) des studios Marvel (Plus d'infos ci-dessousВ !)

Avengers : Doomsday marque un tournant majeur dans l'univers Marvel. Une nouvelle crise mondiale et multiverselle contraint les plus grands hГ©ros de la Terre Г  livrer leur combat le plus pГ©rilleux. Alors que la rГ©alitГ© elle-mГӘme commence Г  se fissurer, l'Г©mergence du Docteur Fatalis introduit une menace caractГ©risГ©e par l'intelligence, la prГ©cision et une ambition absolue. La bande-annonce installe une ambiance plus sombre, dГ©voilant des destructions Г  grande Г©chelle, des mondes qui s'effondrent et des hГ©ros qui luttent pour garder le contrГҙle dans un environnement de plus en plus instable. Tandis que de nouveaux personnages et des hГ©ros de retour se rassemblent, la frontiГЁre entre la survie et la dГ©faite est plus tГ©nue que jamais.

L'histoire explore un futur oГ№ la force brute ne suffira peut-ГӘtre pas Г  arrГӘter le cataclysme, car l'influence de Fatalis s'Г©tend par la stratГ©gie, la technologie et la manipulation Г  travers de multiples rГ©alitГ©s. Les Avengers doivent affronter non seulement un ennemi redoutable, mais aussi les consГ©quences d'un univers dГ©jГ  poussГ© Г  ses limites. Les alliances sont mises Г  l'Г©preuve, le leadership contestГ©, et chaque dГ©cision a des rГ©percussions bien au-delГ  d'une simple ligne temporelle. Avec des scГЁnes d'action spectaculaires, une forte charge Г©motionnelle et un potentiel de crossover important, Avengers : Doomsday s'impose comme l'un des projets les plus ambitieux de Marvel, centrГ© sur l'effondrement, la rГ©sistance et la lutte pour protГ©ger l'avenir du multivers.

Montage, effets spГ©ciaux, effets sonores, miniature par @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Logiciels utilisГ©s : Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

в—Ғ Sur notre chaГ®ne, nous crГ©ons des mashups de bandes-annonces в–· Les mashups de bandes-annonces, aussi appelГ©s bandes-annonces remaniГ©es, sont rГ©alisГ©s en assemblant des extraits de films issus d'un ou plusieurs longs mГ©trages et en les remontant pour crГ©er une toute nouvelle bande-annonce. Ces mashups mettent souvent en scГЁne un film inexistant ou transforment le genre d'un film existant. En tant qu'Е“uvres dГ©rivГ©es, telles que dГ©finies par la loi amГ©ricaine sur le droit d'auteur (17 U.S.C. В§ 101), elles peuvent ГӘtre protГ©gГ©es contre les rГ©clamations pour atteinte aux droits d'auteur grГўce Г  la doctrine de l'utilisation Г©quitable (fair use).

Les mashups de bandes-annonces ne sont pas seulement une forme de crГ©ativitГ© numГ©rique gГ©nГ©rГ©e par les utilisateurs, mais aussi un moyen original de susciter l'enthousiasme autour des sorties Г  venir, en complГ©ment des bandes-annonces officielles. Tandis que les bandes-annonces traditionnelles dГ©voilent l'intrigue et crГ©ent le buzz, les mashups rГ©alisГ©s par les fans permettent au public d'apporter sa propre touche cinГ©matographique aux images existantes. Cette libertГ© crГ©ative peut mettre en avant un acteur en particulier, souligner une intrigue spГ©cifique, ou mГӘme transformer complГЁtement le genre du film.

Cette vidГ©o est une parodie. De par sa nature dГ©rivГ©e et transformative, elle est protГ©gГ©e par l'utilisation Г©quitable (fair use).

Que la force soit avec nous !

de-DE.title: Avengers: Doomsday вҖ“ Erster Trailer вҖһDer letzte DonnergottвҖң | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
de-DE.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Seht euch den Fan-Trailer (Konzept) zu Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) an! (Mehr Infos zum Video weiter unten!)

Avengers: Doomsday markiert einen Wendepunkt im Marvel-Universum: Eine neue globale und multiversale Krise zwingt die mГӨchtigsten Helden der Erde in ihren bisher gefГӨhrlichsten Kampf. Die RealitГӨt selbst beginnt zu zerbrechen, und mit dem Auftauchen von Doctor Doom entsteht eine Bedrohung, die von Intelligenz, PrГӨzision und absolutem Ehrgeiz geprГӨgt ist. Der Trailer schlГӨgt einen dГјsteren Ton an und zeigt ZerstГ¶rung im groГҹen Stil, zusammenbrechende Welten und Helden, die in einer zunehmend instabilen Welt um die Kontrolle kГӨmpfen. Neue und wiederkehrende Charaktere treffen aufeinander, und der Grat zwischen Гңberleben und Niederlage wird dГјnner denn je.

Die Geschichte erkundet eine Zukunft, in der Macht allein nicht mehr ausreicht, um das Kommende aufzuhalten, denn Dooms Einfluss breitet sich durch Strategie, Technologie und Manipulation Гјber verschiedene RealitГӨten aus. Die Avengers mГјssen sich nicht nur einem mГӨchtigen Feind stellen, sondern auch den Folgen eines Universums, das bereits am Rande seiner KrГӨfte ist. Allianzen werden auf die Probe gestellt, FГјhrungsqualitГӨten herausgefordert, und jede Entscheidung hat weitreichende Konsequenzen, die Гјber die Grenzen einer einzelnen Zeitlinie hinausgehen. Mit gewaltigen Actionsequenzen, emotionaler Wucht und groГҹem Crossover-Potenzial zГӨhlt Avengers: Doomsday zu den ambitioniertesten Projekten von Marvel. Im Mittelpunkt stehen der Zusammenbruch, der Widerstand und der Kampf um die Zukunft des Multiversums.

Schnitt, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail von @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Verwendete Software: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

в—Ғ Auf unserem Kanal erstellen wir Trailer-Mashups. в–· Trailer-Mashups, auch bekannt als Recut-Trailer, entstehen durch das Zusammenschneiden verschiedener Filmsequenzen aus einem oder mehreren Filmen zu einem brandneuen Trailer. Diese Mashups stellen oft einen fiktiven Film dar oder verГӨndern das Genre eines bestehenden Films. Als abgeleitete Werke im Sinne des US-amerikanischen Urheberrechtsgesetzes (17 U.S.C. В§ 101) kГ¶nnen sie unter UmstГӨnden durch die Fair-Use-Doktrin vor UrheberrechtsansprГјchen geschГјtzt sein.

Trailer-Mashups sind nicht nur eine Form nutzergenerierter digitaler KreativitГӨt, sondern auch eine einzigartige MГ¶glichkeit, die Vorfreude auf kommende VerГ¶ffentlichungen zu steigern und offizielle Filmtrailer zu ergГӨnzen. WГӨhrend traditionelle Trailer die Handlung andeuten und Hype erzeugen, ermГ¶glichen Fan-Mashups dem Publikum, bestehendes Filmmaterial auf ihre eigene filmische Art zu interpretieren. Diese kreative Freiheit kann einen bestimmten Schauspieler ins Rampenlicht rГјcken, eine bestimmte Handlung hervorheben oder sogar das Genre des Films komplett verГӨndern.

Dieses Video ist eine Parodie. Aufgrund seines abgeleiteten und transformativen Charakters ist es durch die Fair-Use-Doktrin geschГјtzt.

Guarda il 'Concept del trailer dei fan' per Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dei Marvel Studios (Maggiori informazioni su questo video qui sotto!)

Avengers: Doomsday segna una svolta decisiva nell'universo Marvel, con una nuova crisi globale e multiversale che costringe i piГ№ potenti eroi della Terra ad affrontare la battaglia piГ№ pericolosa di sempre. Con la realtГ  stessa che inizia a frammentarsi, l'emergere del Dottor Destino introduce una minaccia definita da intelligenza, precisione e ambizione assoluta. Il trailer adotta un tono piГ№ cupo, mostrando distruzione su vasta scala, mondi che collassano ed eroi che lottano per mantenere il controllo in un ambiente sempre piГ№ instabile. Mentre personaggi nuovi e di ritorno si uniscono, il confine tra sopravvivenza e sconfitta si fa piГ№ sottile che mai.

La storia esplora un futuro in cui il solo potere potrebbe non bastare a fermare ciГІ che sta arrivando, poichГ© l'influenza di Destino si diffonde attraverso strategia, tecnologia e manipolazione in molteplici realtГ . Gli Avengers devono affrontare non solo un nemico potente, ma anche le conseguenze di un universo giГ  spinto al limite. Le alleanze vengono messe alla prova, la leadership ГЁ sfidata e ogni decisione ha un peso che va ben oltre una singola linea temporale. Con sequenze d'azione spettacolari, una forte carica emotiva e un grande potenziale di crossover, Avengers: Doomsday si conferma come uno dei progetti piГ№ ambiziosi della Marvel, incentrato sul collasso, la resistenza e la lotta per proteggere il futuro del multiverso.

Questi mashup spesso raffigurano un film inesistente o ne modificano il genere. Essendo opere derivate, come definite dalla legge statunitense sul diritto d'autore (17 U.S.C. В§ 101), possono essere protetti da rivendicazioni di copyright in base alla dottrina del "fair use" (uso lecito).

I mashup di trailer non sono solo una forma di creativitГ  digitale generata dagli utenti, ma anche un modo unico per creare attesa per le prossime uscite, integrando i trailer ufficiali. Mentre i trailer tradizionali anticipano la trama e generano clamore, i mashup realizzati dai fan permettono al pubblico di dare la propria interpretazione cinematografica al materiale esistente. Questa libertГ  creativa puГІ mettere in risalto un particolare attore, enfatizzare una specifica trama o persino trasformare completamente il genere del film.

id.title: Avengers: Doomsday - Trailer Pertama "Dewa Petir Terakhir" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
id.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Tonton 'Konsep Trailer Fan' untuk Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dari Marvel Studios (Informasi Lebih Lanjut Tentang Video Ini di Bawah!)

Avengers: Doomsday menandai peningkatan besar di alam semesta Marvel saat krisis global dan multiversal baru memaksa para pahlawan terkuat Bumi ke dalam pertempuran paling berbahaya mereka. Dengan realitas itu sendiri yang mulai retak, munculnya Doctor Doom memperkenalkan ancaman yang didefinisikan oleh kecerdasan, ketelitian, dan ambisi absolut. Trailer ini menampilkan nuansa yang lebih gelap, memperlihatkan kehancuran skala besar, dunia yang runtuh, dan para pahlawan yang berjuang untuk mempertahankan kendali dalam lingkungan yang semakin tidak stabil. Saat karakter baru dan lama berkumpul, garis antara bertahan hidup dan kekalahan menjadi lebih tipis dari sebelumnya.

Kisah ini mengeksplorasi masa depan di mana kekuatan saja mungkin tidak cukup untuk menghentikan apa yang akan datang, karena pengaruh Doom menyebar melalui strategi, teknologi, dan manipulasi di berbagai realitas. Avengers harus menghadapi bukan hanya musuh yang kuat, tetapi juga konsekuensi dari alam semesta yang sudah mencapai batasnya. Aliansi diuji, kepemimpinan ditantang, dan setiap keputusan memiliki bobot yang melampaui satu garis waktu. Dengan rangkaian aksi besar-besaran, taruhan emosional yang tinggi, dan potensi crossover yang kuat, Avengers: Doomsday berdiri sebagai salah satu proyek Marvel yang paling ambisius, berpusat pada keruntuhan, perlawanan, dan perjuangan untuk melindungi masa depan multiverse.

Penyuntingan, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail oleh @GalacticTrailerOfficial

Mashup ini sering menggambarkan film yang tidak ada atau mengubah genre film yang sudah ada. Sebagai karya turunan yang didefinisikan berdasarkan Undang-Undang Hak Cipta Amerika Serikat 17 U.S.C. В§ 101, karya-karya ini dapat dilindungi dari klaim hak cipta berdasarkan doktrin penggunaan wajar.

Mashup trailer bukan hanya bentuk kreativitas digital yang dihasilkan pengguna, tetapi juga cara unik untuk membangun antusiasme terhadap rilis mendatang, melengkapi trailer film resmi. Sementara trailer tradisional menggoda plot dan menghasilkan hype, mashup buatan penggemar memungkinkan penonton untuk memberikan sentuhan sinematik mereka sendiri pada cuplikan yang sudah ada. Kebebasan kreatif ini dapat menyoroti aktor tertentu, menekankan alur cerita tertentu, atau bahkan mengubah genre film sepenuhnya.

#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces EarthвҖҷs mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as DoomвҖҷs influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of MarvelвҖҷs most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

в—Ғ On our channel, we create trailer mashups в–· Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesnвҖҷt exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. В§ 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the filmвҖҷs genre entirely.

es-US.title: Vengadores: El fin del mundo - Primer trГЎiler "El Гәltimo dios del trueno" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026

#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Mira el trГЎiler conceptual creado por fans de Avengers: Doomsday (2026) de Marvel Studios (ВЎMГЎs informaciГіn sobre este video abajo!).

Avengers: Doomsday marca un punto de inflexiГіn en el universo Marvel, donde una nueva crisis global y multiversal obliga a los hГ©roes mГЎs poderosos de la Tierra a librar su batalla mГЎs peligrosa hasta la fecha. Con la realidad misma comenzando a fracturarse, la apariciГіn del Doctor Doom introduce una amenaza definida por la inteligencia, la precisiГіn y la ambiciГіn absoluta. El trГЎiler establece un tono mГЎs oscuro, mostrando destrucciГіn a gran escala, mundos que colapsan y hГ©roes luchando por mantener el control en un entorno cada vez mГЎs inestable. A medida que personajes nuevos y conocidos se unen, la lГӯnea entre la supervivencia y la derrota se vuelve mГЎs delgada que nunca.

La historia explora un futuro donde el poder por sГӯ solo podrГӯa no ser suficiente para detener lo que se avecina, ya que la influencia de Doom se extiende a travГ©s de la estrategia, la tecnologГӯa y la manipulaciГіn en mГәltiples realidades. Los Vengadores deben enfrentarse no solo a un poderoso enemigo, sino tambiГ©n a las consecuencias de un universo ya llevado al lГӯmite. Las alianzas se ponen a prueba, el liderazgo se ve desafiado y cada decisiГіn tiene repercusiones que trascienden una sola lГӯnea temporal. Con secuencias de acciГіn Г©picas, una gran carga emocional y un fuerte potencial para crossovers, Avengers: Doomsday se erige como uno de los proyectos mГЎs ambiciosos de Marvel, centrado en el colapso, la resistencia y la lucha por proteger el futuro del multiverso.

snippet.title: KANGULA - Official Trailer l New Odia Film l Sambeet Acharya & Suryamayee Mohapatra l Aswin Tripathy
snippet.description:
#kangula #babubhaiproduction #officialtrailer 


рҹҺ¬ KANGULA вҖ“ MAA KALI RA DANDA NACHA | OFFICIAL TRAILER
рҹҢә In Cinemas Worldwide on 24th April 2026
When faith crosses limitsвҖҰ
When devotion turns into аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝвҖҰ
A force awakens that cannot be contained.
Presenting the Official Trailer of KANGULA вҖ“ Maa Kali Ra Danda Nacha, a soul-stirring cinematic journey inspired by OdishaвҖҷs sacred Danda Nacha tradition вҖ” where pain becomes prayer, and devotion becomes аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ.
Rooted deep in the culture and soil of Odisha, and driven by the fierce energy of Maa Kali, KANGULA unfolds a gripping tale of belief, sacrifice, mystery, and divine power that transcends generations.
This is not just a storyвҖҰ
This is a ritual.
This is a roar of faith.
Feel the rising intensity.
Witness the power of devotion.
Experience the divine presence of Maa Kali like never before.
рҹ”ұ The drums are louder.
рҹ”Ҙ The fire burns stronger.
рҹҢә Maa is arriving.
рҹҺҘ FILM CREDITS
Producer: Suvendra Kumar Malla (Litu) & Sambeet Acharya
Director: Aswin Tripathy
Line Producer: Subodha Mohapatra (Bubu)
Story: Sambeet Acharya
Screenplay & Dialogue: Amit Kumar Dash & Anil Barik
Music: Baidyanath Dash, J N Padma & Sumit Dixit
Background Music: Nabs & Saroj
Cinematography: Ishwar Barik
Editor: Manas Kumar Sahoo
Associate Editor: Debadatta Biswal
Colorist: P.V Manikumar
DI Studio: Cherry Pix, Kolkata
Voice Dubbing: Shakti Studio
Sound Designer: Jubin Raj
Sound Design Studio: SoundSmith Studio, Kerala
Choreographer: Firoz & Dibya
Styling: Prerna Pratikshya
Art Director: Sudhanshu Mohanty (Nilu)
Costume Partner: OAURA
Costume Man: Prabitra Mehena
Associate Director: Durllava
Assistant Directors: Joy, Shanti, Satyajeet
Production Manager: Sankar
Make Up: Sourav Lenka (Pupun)
Edit Studio: Pupul Films
Publicity Partner: IDOL ODISHA
Publicity Design: Blank Canvas RGF
Camera Equipment: Digital Dreams
Creative Visual: ATF Studio
Stills: Basudev Films
BTS Making: Sourav Nath
Visual Effects: Subrat
Promo GFX: The M Factor

All Rights Reserved

Presenting the Official Trailer of вҖңMantra MuugdhaвҖқ

What began as a whisper now rises into a stormвҖҰ vast, powerful, and impossible to ignore. From the visionary mind of National Award winning director Anupam Patnaik comes a grand cinematic spectacle where reality bends, secrets erupt, and the unknown takes over.

Every moment intensifies. Every reveal expands. Every beat echoes larger than life. YouвҖҷve seen the glimpse. Now face the phenomenon.

snippet.title: Bollywood Trailers Are A JokeвҖҰ.But There Is Hope
snippet.description:
The trailers this week have range from underwhelming to straight up, out of syllabus and It just compelled me to make a video on some of them. This ranges from #krishna trailer that features Siddharth Gupta as Lord Krishna, a movie directed by Hardik Gajjar who directed Devon Ka Dev Mahadev. You have the slightly embarrassing Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai with #varundhawan #mrunalthakur and #poojahegde , which may be a remake of Sandwich and the trailer of Ek Din that literally gave everything away. What was #aamirkhan thinking? I hope you like the video on:-

snippet.title: Kasht (Official Video) Amanraj Gill | Preeti Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Kasht (Official Video) Amanraj Gill | Preeti Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026

Dollar Music presents new haryanvi song KASHT by Amanraj Gill & Preeti Choudhary. Lyrics penned by Amanraj Gill, Music given by Amanraj Gill & AJ Fakira. Video by Talha.


Song : KASHT
Singer : Amanraj Gill, Preeti Choudhary 
Female Lead : Magnum Prince
Lyrics / Composer : Amanraj Gill
Music : Amanraj Gill, AJ Fakira
Director : Talha 
DOP : Michael Richard Johnson 
Edit/Di: Inkblaze Studios
Line Production : Ten Plus One UK Productions Limited - Dhadda Motion Pictures
Line Producer : Mandeel Hundal 
Line Manager : Ayush Singh
Costume Stylist : Mandy Bains 
MUA : Jind Kaur
Barber/Hairdresser : Jaffrey
Gaffer : Caleb Gregory
Production Assistants : Satinder Singh, Dharmendra Chaudhary
BTS/Stills : Ajay Dhiman
Producer : Nvii Chhaniwala, Kapil Arora
Label : Dollar Music
Online Promotions : GEET DIGITALS (9053553351)
Reels Promotion : Reels Factory (82220 65686)

Lyrics : 
Seedhe muh na baat kre
Tere sare ulte shonk re,
Mhare saare woi kaam re jinpe Sarkara ki rok re,
O mhare bair bandhe jit jaan
R chaati kar deya roshandaan
Chote pad jaa se shamshaan
ye manas balte konya rey,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

Khule rakhe haatha ne
Thodi jod lia kar Maya ne,
Koi sedhe j tu bta diye
uki daab dewege kaaya ne,
Klla chora ghar ne
Amane sochke dhar le paaya ne,
jinhe jaame poot daler
Na darr hoya karta un maayan ne,
Gundeya ne dewe panah tu
Karta konya kaam bhala tu
dewe sari galat salah
tham darte konya re,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
re Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

Apa baat gehri aale
Phone Blackberry aale
Kaam 18 Tyrei aale
Back sandh carry aale
Yaari raakhde purani
Roj naye bairi aale
Lo jo marji tu shaant
Weapona ki dairy aale
Apa shod deya jo teer
Konya chukte nishane
Leke bandya ki firoti
Dewa plot ke byaane
Kde yes kde no
Re tu laawe gi bahane
Mhare roj ki diwali
Roj aawe se re taane
Jaawe sir te ke baat
mhari paar ambra te
Baaje 1 bje phone
+1 aale numbra te
Fikar na kre
January chahe Decembra te
Dharte na paa chore
Tale defendra te

Samzu m b sari
kyu teri gel fire yo mohalla re,
Ferke chaa me aangli 
Chaa ki bna deya Coka Cola re,
Choti Umre thik nhi
Yo nature tera shoo la re,
Mhare kaale ghode Roada upar
Maarte Chale Jhola re,
Chaaro konya me mhari ghar ki
Miljya Weapon russian turkey
sabki bna dewege firki
faltu jarte konya rey,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re


#kasht #amanrajgill #preetichoudhary #newharyanvisong2026 #newharyanvisong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongs #dollarmusic 

Follow on 
рҹ‘ү Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/dollarmusic...

Subscribe On YouTube.
рҹ‘ү https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTk-...

uki daab dewege kaaya ne,

snippet.title: VARAVU - Teaser | Joju George | Arjun Ashokan | Shaji Kailas | Olga Productions
snippet.description:
Presenting the official teaser of Varavu, featuring Joju George, Arjun Ashokan, Saniya Iyappan, Murali Gopi, Baiju Santhosh, Baburaj, Vani Vishwanath, and more. The film is produced by Naisy Reji under the banner of Olga Productions, directed by Shaji Kailas, with music composed by Sam CS.

аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ° аӨ®аӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖаӨӮ, аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖаӨӮ аӨҶ аӨ®аӨңаӨҫ аӨІаҘҖаӨӮ! рҹҺ¶рҹ”Ҙ 

  #NeelkamalSingh #KhulJaSimSim #NewBhojpuriSong

аӨҜаҘӮаӨӘаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲ аӨўаҘҒаӨӮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘӮ аӨ№аӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аҘҖ
аӨҰаҘӮаӨ° аӨҰаҘӮаӨ° аӨӨ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ—аӨҫаӨ№ аӨ—аӨЎаӨјаӨҫаӨөаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨЎаҘҮ аӨӣаҘҮаӨІ аӨңаҘҒаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аҘҖ
аӨІаӨө аӨҜаҘӮ аӨӯаӨҫаӨӯаҘҖ

аӨӨаҘӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аӨЁ аӨёаҘҖ аӨІаҘҒаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІаӨ® аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ°аҘҖ 
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аӨЁ аӨёаҘҖ аӨІаҘҒаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІаӨ® аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ°аҘҖ 

аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘӮ аӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ•аӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаҘҖ
аӨўаҘҒаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨқаҘӢаӨІ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨ° аӨҡаҘӢаӨҹаҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ— аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ¬аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨңаӨҫ аӨҰаҘӮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ

аӨӨаҘӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аӨЁ аӨёаҘҖ аӨІаҘҒаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІаӨ® аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ°аҘҖ 
аӨӨаҘӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аӨЁ аӨёаҘҖ аӨІаҘҒаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІаӨ® аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ°аҘҖ

snippet.description:
Step back into the golden era of 90s Bollywood with the enchanting melodies of Alka Yagnik and Kumar Sanu! This video celebrates their unforgettable duet, "Gawah Hai Chand Tare" from the movie Damini, a timeless love song that continues to resonate with hearts across generations. Alka Yagnik's sweet voice and Kumar Sanu's soulful rendition perfectly capture the essence of innocent love and longing. Relive the magic of this classic tune and let the nostalgia wash over you.

            

Credits :

Song: Gawah Hai Chand Tare
Album: Damini
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer

аӨЁаӨ®аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°, аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘрҹҷҸ 
аӨҶаӨӘаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҜ аӨңаӨҜ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘ - аӨ®аӨ°аӨҫаӨ аҘҖ аӨҡаҘ…аӨЁаӨІ аӨөаӨ° аӨҶаӨӘаӨІаҘҮ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ—аӨӨ аӨҶаӨ№аҘҮ. 
аӨҜаӨҫ аӨҡаҘ…аӨЁаӨІ аӨөаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨҫаӨӮ аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аӨҜаҘҖ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨӮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҶаӨІаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨӯаӨө, аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖаӨӮаӨҡаҘҖ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҖаӨӨаҘҖ, аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖаӨӮаӨҡаҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЈаҘҮ, аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаҘҮ, аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘӢаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°, аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°, аӨҶаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨ• аӨө аӨҡаӨ®аӨӨаҘҚаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨІаӨҝаӨІаӨҫ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨҡаҘ…аӨЁаҘҮаӨІ аӨөаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ¶аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҖаӨІ..
аӨңаӨҜ аӨңаӨҜ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘ.. аӨҜаӨҫ аӨҡаҘ…аӨЁаҘҮаӨІ аӨІаӨҫ аӨЁаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аҘҖ subscribe аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫрҹҷҸаӨ№аҘҖ аӨЁаӨ®аҘҚаӨ° аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаӨӮаӨӨаҘҖрҹҷҸ

гғҹвҳ… MUSIC-ON вҳ…еҪЎ
к§ҒајәрқҗҒрқҗҖрқҗҖрқҗғрқҗ’рқҗҮрқҗҖрқҗҮ'рқҗ’ рқҗ„рқҗҚрқҗ“рқҗ„рқҗ‘рқҗ“рқҗҖрқҗҲрқҗҚрқҗҢрқҗ„рқҗҚрқҗ“рқҗ’ај»к§Ӯ

|| бҙҖЙҙбҙӣЙӘ-бҙҳЙӘКҖбҙҖбҙ„КҸ бҙЎбҙҖКҖЙҙЙӘЙҙЙў ||  
бҙӣКңЙӘкңұ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙӣбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ ЙӘкңұ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣбҙҮбҙ… бҙӣбҙҸ вққрқҗҒрқҗҖрқҗҖрқҗғрқҗ’рқҗҮрқҗҖрқҗҮ'рқҗ’ рқҗ„рқҗҚрқҗ“рқҗ„рқҗ‘рқҗ“рқҗҖрқҗҲрқҗҚрқҗҢрқҗ„рқҗҚрқҗ“рқҗ’вқһ . бҙҖЙҙКҸ бҙңЙҙбҙҖбҙңбҙӣКңбҙҸКҖЙӘбҙўбҙҮбҙ… КҖбҙҮбҙҳКҖбҙҸбҙ…бҙңбҙ„бҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ, КҖбҙҮбҙ…ЙӘкңұбҙӣКҖЙӘКҷбҙңбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ бҙҸКҖ КҖбҙҮ-бҙңбҙҳКҹбҙҸбҙҖбҙ… ЙӘкңұ кңұбҙӣКҖЙӘбҙ„бҙӣКҹКҸ бҙҳКҖбҙҸКңЙӘКҷЙӘбҙӣбҙҮбҙ…. КҹбҙҮЙўбҙҖКҹ бҙҖбҙ„бҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ бҙЎЙӘКҹКҹ КҷбҙҮ бҙӣбҙҖбҙӢбҙҮЙҙ бҙҖЙўбҙҖЙӘЙҙкңұбҙӣ бҙӣКңбҙҸкңұбҙҮ бҙЎКңбҙҸ бҙ ЙӘбҙҸКҹбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ бҙҸкң° бҙӣКңбҙҮ кңұбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮ

snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 рҹ’һ 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаҘӮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨӨаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аӨ° аӨ§аӨЎаӨјаӨ•аӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨ¬аӨё аӨ—аҘӮаӨҒаӨңаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨҝаӨІаӨёаӨҝаӨІаӨҫаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҡаӨҫаӨҰаӨ° аӨ“аӨўаӨјаҘҮ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ—аҘҒаӨңаӨјаӨ° аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨёаҘҚаӨөаҘҖаӨ° аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨӯаҘҖ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӯаҘҖаӨ— аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӮаӨ аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ–аҘҒаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘӮаӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҫ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨҒаӨҡаӨІ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӣаӨҫаӨҒаӨө аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаҘҒаӨ•аҘӮаӨЁ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҫаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨөаҘӢ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ аӨҫаӨё аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨңаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаӨ—аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨ®аҘӢаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаҘӢ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аҘӮаӨ№ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨңаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҲаӨӮ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫ аӨүаӨ аӨҫ,
аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӣаҘӮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨ–аӨ° аӨүаӨ аӨҫаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаҘӢ аӨңаҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаӨҫ, аӨөаҘӢ аӨңаҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аӨ° аӨІаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ, аӨ…аӨ§аҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ-аӨёаӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨӯаҘҖ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ№аӨёаӨҫаӨё аӨ°аӨ№аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨ№аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ® аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ, аӨёаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҫаӨё аӨ°аӨ№аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ–аӨјаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨ° аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӯаҘҖ, аӨ®аӨ№аӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ«аҘӮаӨІ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҡаӨІаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аӨ° аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ§аҘӮаӨІаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨүаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨј аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨ№аӨҡаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӣ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ, аӨ…аӨ—аӨ° аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨҸ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨё, аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¬аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ° аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨ®аҘӢаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаҘӮаӨҒ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘӮ аӨҡаӨІ аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ,

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаҘӮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨӨаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ,

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӮаӨ аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ–аҘҒаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘӮаӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҫ,

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨ®аҘӢаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаҘӢ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аҘӮаӨ№ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨңаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҡаӨІаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аӨ° аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ§аҘӮаӨІаҘӨ

snippet.description:
Welcome to ORION CONQUEST SERIES вҖ” one of IndiaвҖҷs biggest competitive BGMI esports tournaments.

рҹҸҶ STAGE: Grand Finals вҖ“ Day 3
рҹ“… DATE: 17th April 2026
вҸ° TIME: 12:30 PM onwards
рҹ“Қ FORMAT: Online

TEAMS PARTICIPATING
Hero Xtreme GodLike
iQOO Orangutan
Infinix True Rippers
iQOO Revenant X Spark
Gods Reign
Genesis Esports
Team Punk
Vasista Esports
iQOO Team Tamilas
Higgboson Esports
Learn From Past
Troy Tamilan Esports
Team H4K
Rapid Chaos
Zutsu Gaming
Team Earny

MATCH MAP ORDER
рҹ”№ Rondo
рҹ”№ Erangel
рҹ”№ Erangel
рҹ”№ Miramar
рҹ”№ Miramar
рҹ”№ Erangel

Welcome to Orion Esports, where passion meets precision in the world of competitive gaming. Join us on this adrenaline-fueled journey as we carve our mark in the esports realm, fearlessly pushing boundaries and championing excellence.
Our mission is clear: to empower and elevate esports enthusiasts, providing a platform that celebrates skill, strategy, and unbridled determination.

Orion Esports is a competitive gaming organization dedicated to excellence, innovation, and community within the global esports scene. Founded with a passion for gaming and a commitment to growth, Welt Esports brings together top-tier talent, strategic minds, and a shared vision to dominate the digital battlefield.

snippet.title: Suna Suna | Official Video | Krishna Cottage | Shreya Ghoshal | Anu Malik | Sohail Khan | Isha K
snippet.description:
вңЁ Experience the timeless emotion of Suna Suna Lamha Lamha full song from 'Krishna Cottage', beautifully sung by Shreya Ghoshal, now trending as a bridal entry song for 2026, credit goes to Nupur Sanon and Stebin Ben's weddingрҹ’Қ.

This iconic Bollywood love song, known for its deep emotions, is making a powerful comeback. Inspired by the viral Nupur Sanon wedding song, brides of 2026 are choosing 'Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja' as their grand bridal entry song, turning an old Hindi song into a moment of elegance and beauty.

Take a sneak peek into this wedding-style version of 'Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho' song and feel the magic where romance meets nostalgia. Whether you love it as a timeless Bollywood song or a couple's entry song, this romantic song brings a fresh and dreamy vibe.

рҹҺ¶ Perfect for fans of Aaja Ve Sajna, Krishna cottage songs, or Shreya Ghoshal songs.

#Sunasuna #ShreyaGhosal #KrishnaCottageSongs #LoveSong #RomanticSong #aisamilan #bridalentry #bollywoodsongs #bollywoodmoviesong  #bepanahpyaarhaiaaja  #hindisong

suna suna lamha lamha meri raahe tanha tanha

bepnaah pyar hai aaja tera intejar hai aaja

it.title: Suna Suna | Video ufficiale | Krishna Cottage | Shreya Ghoshal | Anu Malik | Sohail Khan | Isha K
it.description:
вңЁ Vivi l'emozione senza tempo di "Suna Suna Lamha Lamha", la canzone completa tratta da "Krishna Cottage", splendidamente cantata da Shreya Ghoshal, ora di tendenza come canzone d'ingresso per le spose nel 2026, grazie al matrimonio di Nupur Sanon e Stebin Ben рҹ’Қ.

Questa iconica canzone d'amore di Bollywood, nota per la sua profonda emotivitГ , sta tornando prepotentemente alla ribalta. Ispirate dalla canzone virale del matrimonio di Nupur Sanon, le spose del 2026 stanno scegliendo "Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja" come canzone d'ingresso per il loro matrimonio, trasformando una vecchia canzone hindi in un momento di eleganza e bellezza.

Dai un'occhiata a questa versione in stile nuziale di "Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho" e senti la magia dove il romanticismo incontra la nostalgia. Che tu la ami come una canzone senza tempo di Bollywood o come canzone d'ingresso per gli sposi, questa canzone romantica porta un'atmosfera fresca e sognante.


рҹҺ¶ Perfetto per i fan di Aaja Ve Sajna, delle canzoni dei cottage di Krishna o delle canzoni di Shreya Ghoshal.

id.description:
вңЁ Rasakan emosi abadi dari lagu lengkap Suna Suna Lamha Lamha dari 'Krishna Cottage', yang dinyanyikan dengan indah oleh Shreya Ghoshal, kini menjadi tren sebagai lagu pengiring pengantin untuk tahun 2026, berkat pernikahan Nupur Sanon dan Stebin Ben рҹ’Қ.

Lagu cinta Bollywood ikonik ini, yang dikenal karena emosinya yang dalam, kembali dengan penuh semangat. Terinspirasi oleh lagu pernikahan Nupur Sanon yang viral, para pengantin tahun 2026 memilih 'Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja' sebagai lagu pengiring pengantin mereka yang megah, mengubah lagu Hindi lama menjadi momen keanggunan dan keindahan.

Intip sekilas versi lagu 'Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho' ala pernikahan ini dan rasakan keajaiban di mana romansa bertemu nostalgia. Baik Anda menyukainya sebagai lagu Bollywood abadi atau lagu pengiring pengantin pasangan, lagu romantis ini menghadirkan nuansa segar dan penuh impian.

Esta icГіnica canciГіn de amor de Bollywood, conocida por su profunda emotividad, estГЎ regresando con fuerza. Inspiradas por la canciГіn viral de la boda de Nupur Sanon, las novias de 2026 estГЎn eligiendo "Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja" como su gran canciГіn de entrada nupcial, transformando una vieja canciГіn hindi en un momento de elegancia y belleza.

Echa un vistazo a esta versiГіn nupcial de la canciГіn "Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho" y siente la magia donde el romance se encuentra con la nostalgia. аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ№аҘӢ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨҗаӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨҝаӨҳаӨІ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаӨ•аҘӢ аӨҗаӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаҘӢ
аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨөаҘӢ аӨ¶аӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨӮ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ–аҘҒаӨҰ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨӘаӨҝаӨ—аӨІ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖ
аӨёаҘҒаӨ¬аӨ№ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаҘӮаӨ°аӨң аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨ аӨўаӨІ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖ
аӨҗаӨёаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨЁ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨёаӨ¬ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨ№аҘҖ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ№аҘӢ

snippet.description:

рқ‘Ёрқ’ғрқ’җрқ’–рқ’• рқ‘Ҫрқ’Ҡрқ’…рқ’Ҷрқ’җ :-
аӨЁаӨ®аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°! аӨҶаӨң аӨҶаӨӘаӨЈ аӨӘаӨөаӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨ—аӨ¶аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨ®аӨ№аӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӨаҘҖаӨІ аӨ—аҘҒаӨ°аҘҒаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ, аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨІаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҚаӨ®аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫаӨҡаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨІаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҚаӨ®аҘҖаӨҡаҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨҗаӨ•аӨЈаӨҫаӨ° аӨҶаӨ№аҘӢаӨӨ вҒЁ@RDCMarathiBhakti  аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨҡаҘ…аӨЁаҘҮаӨІаӨөаӨ°! 

аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ§аӨЁ, аӨёаӨ®аҘғаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аҘҖ, аӨёаҘҢаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜ аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨӨаҘҮаӨҡаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨ• аӨҶаӨ№аҘҮ. аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаҘҮаӨ• аӨ—аҘҒаӨ°аҘҒаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҳаӨ°аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨӯаӨӨаҘҚаӨө аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ аӨҗаӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜ аӨЁаӨҫаӨӮаӨҰаӨӨаҘҮ.

snippet.title: MARHAMI 2.0  | The Song You LovedвҖҰ Now Deeper | Official Audio вҖў Vibe Chapters
snippet.description:
MARHAMI 2.0 рҹ’ҷ | The Love That Healed Me Again | Official Audio | Vibe Chapters

After the love and support on the original вҖңMARHAMIвҖқ,
presenting its next chapter вҖ” MARHAMI 2.0.

This is not just a remakeвҖҰ
this is a deeper feeling.

MARHAMI 2.0 is about that same love,
but stronger, calmer, and more real.

Jab pehli baar kisi ne tumhe heal kiya tha,
aur phir tum samjhe вҖ”
ye sirf pyaar nahiвҖҰ
ye sukoon hai.

This version carries more emotions,
more depth,
and a more personal connection.

ItвҖҷs about finding someone
who doesnвҖҷt just love youвҖҰ
but understands your silence,
heals your past,
and becomes your peace. рҹ’ҷ

If the first song touched your heart,
this one will stay in it.

Close your eyes, feel every beat,
and let MARHAMI 2.0 take you deeper into love. вңЁ


---

рҹҺ§ Available On

Spotify вҖў Apple Music вҖў JioSaavn вҖў Gaana вҖў Amazon Music вҖў YouTube Music вҖў Instagram Reels вҖў Facebook

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars рҹҳұрҹ”Ҙ аӨ•аҘҢаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨҡаҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ?
snippet.description:
аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҮаӨё рҹ”ҙ LIVE аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ® Grand Theft Auto V аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨңаӨ¬аӨ°аӨҰаӨёаҘҚаӨӨ аӨҸаӨ•аҘҚаӨёаӨӘаҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ!

рҹҡ—рҹ’Ҙ 100 аӨІаӨ—аҘҚаӨңаӨјаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨөаҘҮ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҲаӨ• аӨӘаӨ° аӨ–аӨЎаӨјаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ
рҹҡҶ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҶ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨІ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘҖаӨЎ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁ!

рҹҳұ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ®аӨ№аӨӮаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ• аӨӘаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖ?
аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаӨ¬ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨ—аӨҫ аӨҡаӨ•аӨЁаӨҫаӨҡаҘӮаӨ°?

en-US.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars рҹҳұрҹ”Ҙ Who will survive?
en-US.description:
In today's рҹ”ҙ LIVE stream, we're going to conduct an amazing experiment inside Grand Theft Auto V!

рҹҡ—рҹ’Ҙ 100 luxury cars are parked on the railway track
рҹҡҶ and a full-speed train is coming from the front!

рҹҳұ Will these expensive cars be able to stop the train?
Or will everything be destroyed?

рҹ‘ү Join the LIVE and see which car is the strongest!

Synopsis:
Rakesh (Abhishek Bachchan) is a man of schemes, ideas, invention and restlessness. His small town begins to feel too small for his King size plans.

In another part of India crinkle nosed small town girl, Vimmi (Rani Mukerji) doesnвҖҷt want to become just another young marriageable girl. In her mind she is the вҖңMiss IndiaвҖқ that the world canвҖҷt get enough of.

So, they decide to fly the coup.

Somewhere along their individual journeys, Rakesh and Vimmi meet. And in a moment of mistaken truth, the legend of Bunty and Babli are born.

And the world gets turned on its head!!

We follow the duo through caper after caper, in which they are spiritual gurus; bureaucrat and secretary, gangster and moll; business partners; hen pecked husband and pregnant wife, vagabonds and caught-in-a-downpour lovers.

We watch them run rings around rajahs, power brokers, shaadi bandwallahs, millionaires, investors, leaders, ministers, elephants, explorers, hoteliers, chai boys and one very very upset policeman, DCP Dashrath Singh (Amitabh Bachchan).

snippet.title: аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨІаҘӢаӨ— аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ | Mehboob Ki Mehndi | Lata Mangeshkar Songs | Leena Chandavarkar
snippet.description:
аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖаӨІаҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨң аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨІаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ, аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ®аӨӮаӨ—аҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аӨ° аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЎаҘӮаӨ¬аҘҮ, 'аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨІаҘӢаӨ— аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ' аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҸаҘӨ 70 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨ¶аӨ• аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҮаӨё аӨЁаӨ—аӨ®аҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨ№аӨёаҘӮаӨё аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨӨ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ–аҘҒаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ—аӨ® аӨӯаҘҖаҘӨ аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨҮаӨё аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨё аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨІаӨ—аӨҫ? аӨ•аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨҜаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ¬ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁ аӨӯаҘӮаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаӨҫаӨ•аӨҝ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨҗаӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ–аҘӮаӨ¬аӨёаҘӮаӨ°аӨӨ аӨЁаӨ—аӨ®аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҶаӨЁаӨӮаӨҰ аӨІаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ

Let the magic of music live onвҖҰ

аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖаӨІаҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨң аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨІаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ, аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ®аӨӮаӨ—аҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•аӨ° аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЎаҘӮаӨ¬аҘҮ, 'аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨІаҘӢаӨ— аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ' аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҸаҘӨ 70 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨ¶аӨ• аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҮаӨё аӨЁаӨ—аӨ®аҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аӨ№аӨёаҘӮаӨё аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ¬аӨӨ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ–аҘҒаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ—аӨ® аӨӯаҘҖаҘӨ аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨҮаӨё аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨё аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

snippet.title: Appa LaptopвқҢ Gaming Laptopвң… - Top Games on а®…а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®ҫ Laptop рҹҺ®
snippet.description:
In this video, PC Doc Nandha tests a 2026 government-provided Acer laptop by running a wide range of games, from indie titles to esports games. Since the laptop does not have a dedicated GPU, we explore how far it can go with its built-in hardware. We also break down the full specifications, including our 2TB SSD upgrade used for game installations. Finally, we analyze the FPS performance across different games to show what this laptop is realistically capable of, highlighting the true gap between expectation and reality from smooth gameplay to complete breakdown.

===========

1:28 - Indie games
6:08 - AAA games
11:38 - Esports games
13:43 - RDR2

snippet.description:
"drop dead" out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/dropdead

Presave 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out on June 12th: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/chateauversailles


Lyrics

I know that the bar closes at 11
I hope you never finish that beer
You know all the words to вҖңJust Like HeavenвҖқ
And I know why he wrote them
Now that youвҖҷre standing right here

Ohh
One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
ItвҖҷs feminine intuition
вҖҳCuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
YouвҖҷre looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive IвҖҷve ever been
But kiss me and I might drop dead

And I feel like I might throw up
Left hook, right punch to the gut
YouвҖҷre so so pretty boy
IвҖҷm paranoid I made you up
Yeah IвҖҷd love it if you walked me home
If you promised we could go real slow
вҖҳCuz I got chewing gum
And a bunch of stuff IвҖҷd like to know
Like, have you ever been to Japan?
Or taken that Eurostar to France?
IвҖҷve been dropping hints all night
That IвҖҷd love it if you held my hand, goddamn
And then maybe we could make-makeout
Clothes off and fall to the ground
LetвҖҷs go steady
LetвҖҷs go out
And tell the whole damn world how

One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
ItвҖҷs feminine intuition
вҖҳCuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
YouвҖҷre looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive IвҖҷve ever been
But kiss me and I might

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

Ohh
One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
ItвҖҷs feminine intuition
вҖҳCuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
YouвҖҷre looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive IвҖҷve ever been
But kiss me and I might
Kiss me and I might
Kiss me and I might drop dead

snippet.title: Jagannath Chaka Nain Lilachal Vare | Tu Na Sambhale Toh Hume Kaun Sambhale | Jagannath Bhajan 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhakti Divine Beats рҹҷҸ

Jagannath Chaka Nain Lilachal Vare | Tu Na Sambhale Toh Hume Kaun Sambhale | Jagannath Bhajan 2026 

в—ҶSong : Jagannath Chaka Nain Lilachal Vare (аӨңаӨ—аӨЁаҘҚаӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨЁ аӨЁаҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҡаӨІ)
в—ҶSinger : Rajesh Chandra
в—ҶMusic : Arun Vir
в—ҶLyrics : Traditional

в—ҶHindi Lyrics:

аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ,
аӨЁаҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҡаӨІ аӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨӨаҘӮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҢаӨӮаӨЁ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ
аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ....

1.аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫаӨө аӨёаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ« аӨҸаӨ• аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ,
аӨӨаҘӮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҢаӨӮаӨЁ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ
аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ,
аӨЁаҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҡаӨІ аӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨӨаҘӮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҢаӨӮаӨЁ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ
аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ....

2.аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ•аӨҝаӨё аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ,
аӨӨаҘӮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҢаӨӮаӨЁ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ
аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ,
аӨЁаҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҡаӨІ аӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨӨаҘӮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҢаӨӮаӨЁ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ
аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ....

3.аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӨаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ,
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨҫаӨң аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ
аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ аӨҡаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҲаӨӮаӨЁ,
аӨЁаҘҖаӨІаӨҫаӨҡаӨІ аӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨӨаҘӮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҢаӨӮаӨЁ аӨёаӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ
аӨңаӨ—аҘҚаӨ—аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘ...

в—ҶEnglish Lyrics:

{ Jagannath Chaka Nain, Lilachal Vare...
Tu Na Sambhale Toh Hume Kaun SambhaleвҖҰ
Meri Naiyya Hai Ab Tere HawaleвҖҰ }

в—ҶLabel  : Digiline Media

This channel is devoted to spreading divine love through bhajans, kirtans, mantras, and spiritual music. Our mission is to fill your heart with peace, faith, and positive vibrations.

snippet.title: аӨ®аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ®аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨҡаӨөаӨІаӨӮ аӨҜаҘҮаӨЎаӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨЁ | Marata Marata Vachaval Yedamain | rushabh hatkar | Yedamay Sad song
snippet.description:
аӨёаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨқаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ......

8999139151 вңЁ
#yedamai  #yedamai #aambabai #yedamai_song  #yedamai_new_song #sad #sadsong #sadsongyedamai


аӨёаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨөаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨҶаӨӘаӨІаӨӮ аӨ®аӨЁаӨҫаӨӘаӨҫаӨёаҘӮаӨЁ аӨёаӨ№аӨ°аҘҚаӨ·  аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ—аӨӨ... рҹҷҸрҹҷҸ
....
аӨ®аӨҫаӨ—аҘҖаӨІ аӨёаҘүаӨӮаӨ— аӨІаӨҫ аӨңаӨёаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаӨҫ аӨӨаӨёаӨҫ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЈ аӨёаҘүаӨӮаӨ— аӨІаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨІ аӨ…аӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ…аӨӘаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘӢ рҹҷҸрҹҷҸ

аӨӢаӨ·аӨӯ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҹаӨ•аӨ°.....рҹ’ҜвңЁ

аӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨЁаҘӢ аӨӢаӨ·аӨӯ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҹаӨ•аӨ° аӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨҡаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨӨ аӨҶаӨӘаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨёаӨҫаӨ аҘҖ аӨҳаҘҮаӨҠаӨЁ аӨҶаӨІаҘӢ аӨҶаӨ№аҘҮ SAD SONG аӨӨаӨ°аҘҖ аӨІаӨөаӨ•аӨ° аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨёаҘүаӨӮаӨ— аӨӘаӨҫаӨ№аҘӮаӨЁ аӨҡаӨҫаӨҜаӨЁаӨІ  аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲаӨ¬ аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ аӨёаӨ№аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ...,,рҹҷҸрҹҷҸ


@..аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨүаӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶ аӨЎаҘӢаӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаҘҖаӨІ..@

@..аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ - аӨ®аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ®аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨҡаӨөаӨІаӨӮ аӨҜаҘҮаӨЎаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨЁ.@

@..аӨ—аӨҫаӨҜаӨ• - аӨӢаӨ·аӨӯ аӨ№аӨҫаӨҹаӨ•аӨ°..@

@..аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ- аӨёаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаҘӢаӨіаҘҮ ..@

@.. аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ- аӨёаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаҘӢаӨіаҘҮ..@



#...аӨөаҘҚаӨ№аӨҝаӨЎаӨҝаӨ“ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ№аҘӮаӨЁ аӨқаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨөаӨ° аӨЁаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аҘӮаӨЁ аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ•аӨёаӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨҹаӨІаӨҫ аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲаӨ¬ аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜаӨІаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨёаӨ°аҘӮ аӨЁаӨ•аӨҫрҹҷҸ... аӨ…аӨёаҘҮаӨІ аӨЁаӨөаӨЁаӨөаҘҖаӨЁ аӨөаҘҚаӨ№аӨҝаӨЎаӨҝаӨ“ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨҜаӨІаӨҫ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаӨӨаҘҖаӨІ аӨҶаӨЁаҘҖ аӨЁаӨө аӨЁаӨөаӨҝаӨЁ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨ§аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаҘҖ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲаӨІ рҹҷҸаӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨЁаӨөаҘҖаӨЁ аӨҶаӨ№аҘҮ аӨёаӨ№аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲаӨ¬ аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨІ аӨҶаӨҜаӨ•аҘүаӨЁ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ¬аӨҫаӨҜаӨІаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨёаӨ°аҘӮ аӨЁаӨ•аӨҫ.......рҹҷҸрҹҷҸ

snippet.title: Akshaya Trutiya Kahani | а¬…а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҹ а¬Өаӯға¬ӨаӯҖаӯҹа¬ҫ а¬•а¬ҫа¬№а¬ҫа¬ЈаӯҖ | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
а¬“а¬Ўа¬ја¬ҝа¬Ҷ а¬Әа¬°а¬®аӯҚа¬Әа¬°а¬ҫа¬°аӯҮ а¬…а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҹ а¬Өаӯға¬ӨаӯҖаӯҹа¬ҫ а¬№аӯҮа¬үа¬ӣа¬ҝ а¬Ҹа¬• а¬…а¬ӨаӯҚаӯҹа¬ЁаӯҚа¬Ө а¬¶аӯҒа¬ӯ а¬“ а¬Әа¬¬а¬ҝа¬ӨаӯҚа¬° а¬Ұа¬ҝа¬ЁаҘӨ а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҝ а¬Ұа¬ҝа¬Ёа¬ а¬ҫа¬°аӯҒ а¬№а¬ҝа¬Ғ а¬®а¬№а¬ҫа¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬ӯаӯҒа¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬¬а¬ҝа¬¶аӯҚа¬өа¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬ёа¬ҝа¬ҰаӯҚа¬§ а¬°а¬Ҙа¬Ҝа¬ҫа¬ӨаӯҚа¬°а¬ҫ а¬Әа¬ҫа¬Үа¬Ғ а¬°а¬Ҙ а¬Ёа¬ҝа¬°аӯҚа¬®а¬ҫа¬Ја¬° а¬…а¬ЁаӯҒа¬•аӯӮа¬і а¬№аӯӢа¬Үа¬Ҙа¬ҫа¬Ҹ а¬Ҹа¬¬а¬Ӯ а¬ҡа¬ҫа¬·аӯҖ а¬ӯа¬ҫа¬Ү а¬Ёа¬ҝа¬ң а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҮа¬Өа¬°аӯҮ а¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬Ҙа¬® а¬¬а¬ҝа¬№а¬Ё а¬¬аӯҒа¬Ја¬ҝа¬Ҙа¬ҫа¬ҸаҘӨ а¬Ҷа¬Әа¬Ја¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬ҝаӯҹ а¬ҡаӯҚаӯҹа¬ҫа¬ЁаӯҮа¬ІаӯҚ а¬Ҷа¬Әа¬Ја¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬Әа¬ҫа¬Үа¬Ғ а¬ЁаӯҮа¬Үа¬Ҷа¬ёа¬ҝа¬ӣа¬ҝ а¬•а¬ЈаӯҚа¬ а¬¶а¬ҝа¬іаӯҚа¬ӘаӯҖ а¬Ёа¬®а¬ҝа¬Өа¬ҫ а¬…а¬—аӯҚа¬°аӯұа¬ҫа¬Іа¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬ёаӯҒа¬®а¬§аӯҒа¬° а¬ёаӯҚаӯұа¬°а¬°аӯҮ "а¬…а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҹ а¬Өаӯға¬ӨаӯҖаӯҹа¬ҫ а¬•а¬ҫа¬№а¬ҫа¬ЈаӯҖ" а¬“ а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҫа¬° а¬®а¬ҫа¬№а¬ҫа¬ӨаӯҚа¬®аӯҚаӯҹаҘӨ

а¬“а¬Ўа¬ја¬ҝа¬Ҷ а¬Әа¬°а¬®аӯҚа¬Әа¬°а¬ҫа¬°аӯҮ а¬…а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҹ а¬Өаӯға¬ӨаӯҖаӯҹа¬ҫ а¬№аӯҮа¬үа¬ӣа¬ҝ а¬Ҹа¬• а¬…а¬ӨаӯҚаӯҹа¬ЁаӯҚа¬Ө а¬¶аӯҒа¬ӯ а¬“ а¬Әа¬¬а¬ҝа¬ӨаӯҚа¬° а¬Ұа¬ҝа¬ЁаҘӨ а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҝ а¬Ұа¬ҝа¬Ёа¬ а¬ҫа¬°аӯҒ а¬№а¬ҝа¬Ғ а¬®а¬№а¬ҫа¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬ӯаӯҒа¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬¬а¬ҝа¬¶аӯҚа¬өа¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬ёа¬ҝа¬ҰаӯҚа¬§ а¬°а¬Ҙа¬Ҝа¬ҫа¬ӨаӯҚа¬°а¬ҫ а¬Әа¬ҫа¬Үа¬Ғ а¬°а¬Ҙ а¬Ёа¬ҝа¬°аӯҚа¬®а¬ҫа¬Ја¬° а¬…а¬ЁаӯҒа¬•аӯӮа¬і а¬№аӯӢа¬Үа¬Ҙа¬ҫа¬Ҹ а¬Ҹа¬¬а¬Ӯ а¬ҡа¬ҫа¬·аӯҖ а¬ӯа¬ҫа¬Ү а¬Ёа¬ҝа¬ң а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҮа¬Өа¬°аӯҮ а¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬Ҙа¬® а¬¬а¬ҝа¬№а¬Ё а¬¬аӯҒа¬Ја¬ҝа¬Ҙа¬ҫа¬ҸаҘӨ а¬Ҷа¬Әа¬Ја¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬ӘаӯҚа¬°а¬ҝаӯҹ а¬ҡаӯҚаӯҹа¬ҫа¬ЁаӯҮа¬ІаӯҚ а¬Ҷа¬Әа¬Ја¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬Әа¬ҫа¬Үа¬Ғ а¬ЁаӯҮа¬Үа¬Ҷа¬ёа¬ҝа¬ӣа¬ҝ а¬•а¬ЈаӯҚа¬ а¬¶а¬ҝа¬іаӯҚа¬ӘаӯҖ а¬Ёа¬®а¬ҝа¬Өа¬ҫ а¬…а¬—аӯҚа¬°аӯұа¬ҫа¬Іа¬ҷаӯҚа¬• а¬ёаӯҒа¬®а¬§аӯҒа¬° а¬ёаӯҚаӯұа¬°а¬°аӯҮ "а¬…а¬•аӯҚа¬·аӯҹ а¬Өаӯға¬ӨаӯҖаӯҹа¬ҫ а¬•а¬ҫа¬№а¬ҫа¬ЈаӯҖ" а¬“ а¬Ҹа¬№а¬ҫа¬° а¬®а¬ҫа¬№а¬ҫа¬ӨаӯҚа¬®аӯҚаӯҹаҘӨ
